metadata.title: Git
metadata.description: Integrate Git version control with automatic backup and other advanced features.

regex.source: .setName("Show the count of modified files in the status bar")
regex.target: .setName("显示状态栏中修改文件的数量")

regex.source: .setName("Show commit authoring information next to each line")
regex.target: .setName("显示每行旁边的提交作者信息")

regex.source: .setName("Follow movement and copies across files and commits")
regex.target: .setName("跟踪移动并跨文件和提交进行复制")
.setName("忽略更改中的空格和换行符")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable to use one interval for commit and another for sync.")
regex.target: .setDesc("允许使用一个间隔进行提交,另一个间隔进行同步。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`If turned on, sets last auto ${i} timestamp to the latest commit timestamp. This reduces the frequency of auto ${i} when doing manual commits.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果启用,将最后一次自动 ${i} 时间戳设置为最新的提交时间戳。这减少了在进行手动提交时自动 ${i} 的频率。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Push commits every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每X分钟推送提交。设置为0(默认)以禁用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Pull changes every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每 X 分钟拉取更改。设置为 0(默认)以禁用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You will get a pop up to specify your message.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您将收到一个弹出窗口以指定您的消息。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message).")
regex.target: .setDesc("可用占位符:{{date}}(见下文)、{{hostname}}(见下文)、{{numFiles}}(提交中更改的文件数量)和{{files}}(提交信息中的更改文件)。")
.setDesc("为每个设备指定自定义主机名。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Decide how to integrate commits from your remote branch into your local branch.")
regex.target: .setDesc("决定如何将远程分支中的提交集成到本地分支中。")
.setDesc("自动在 Obsidian 启动时拉取提交。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Commit-and-sync with default settings means staging everything -> committing -> pulling -> pushing. Ideally this is a single action that you do regularly to keep your local and remote repository in sync.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用默认设置的 提交和同步 意味着暂存所有内容 -> 提交 -> 拉取 -> 推送。理想情况下,这是一个你定期执行的单一操作,用于保持本地和远程仓库的同步。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the author of the commit in the history view.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的作者。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的日期。使用 {{date}} 占位符格式来显示日期。")

regex.source: .setDesc("On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在较慢的机器上,这可能会导致延迟。如果是这样,请禁用此选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当没有需要提交或推送的更改时,不显示通知。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.")
.setDesc("Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.")
regex.target: .setDesc("输入您的密码。您将无法再次看到它。")

regex.source: .setDesc("These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be requried for special setups.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这些设置通常无需更改,但在特殊配置中可能需要。")

regex.source: .setDesc('"Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.')
regex.target: .setDesc('"提交和同步"以及"拉取"处理子模块。缺失的功能:冲突文件、拉取/推送/提交文件的数量。每个子模块需要设置跟踪分支。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).")
regex.target: .setDesc("每当根仓库发生检出时,递归检出子模块(如果分支存在)。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用每一行作为新环境变量,格式为 KEY=VALUE 。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Removing previously added environment variables will not take effect until Obsidian is restarted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("移除之前添加的环境变量直到 Obsidian 重启才生效。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`
            设置 Git 二进制文件应从哪个存储库执行的相对路径。主要用于设置 Git 仓库的路径,只有当 Git 仓库位于分库根目录之下时才需要。在 Windows 下使用"\\"代替"/"。
            `)

regex.source: .setDesc('Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')
regex.target: .setDesc('需要重启 Obsidian 才能生效。在 Windows 上使用"\\"而不是"/"。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Disables the plugin on this device. This setting is not synced.")
regex.target: .setDesc("禁用此设备上的插件。此设置不会同步。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您喜欢这个插件,请考虑捐赠以支持持续开发。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If and how the author is displayed")
.setDesc("If and how the date and time of authoring the line is displayed")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果以及如何显示该行的创作日期和时间")
.setPlaceholder("目录/带 Git 仓库的目录")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Type your message and select optional the version with the added date.")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("输入您的消息并可选择添加日期的版本。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Not supported files will be opened by default app!")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("不支持的文件将由默认应用程序打开！")
.setName("显示文件菜单中的暂存/取消暂存按钮")

regex.source: .setDesc("Disable notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates). Errors are still shown as notifications even if you enable this setting.")
regex.target: .setDesc("禁用 Git 操作的通知以减少干扰(请参阅状态栏以获取更新)。即使您启用此设置,错误仍会作为通知显示。")

regex.source: .log(`Did not delete ${y} because directory is not empty`)
.setName("Specify custom commit message on auto backup")
regex.target: .setName("在自动备份时指定自定义提交信息")

regex.source: .setDesc(`${r.settings.differentIntervalCommitAndPush?"Commit":"Commit and sync"} changes every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable. (See below setting for further configuration!)`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`${r.settings.differentIntervalCommitAndPush?"提交":"提交并同步"}每 X 分钟变更。设置为 0(默认)以禁用。(请参见下面的设置以进行进一步配置！)`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Requires the ${i} interval not to be 0.
                        If turned on, do auto ${i} every ${$s(r.settings.autoSaveInterval)} after stopping file edits.
                        This also prevents auto ${i} while editing a file. If turned off, it's independent from the last file edit.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`需要 ${i} 间隔不为 0。
                        如果开启,则在停止文件编辑后每隔 ${$s(r.settings.autoSaveInterval)} 自动 ${i}。
                        这也会防止在编辑文件时自动 ${i}。如果关闭,则与上次文件编辑无关。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Most of the time you want to push after committing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${r.settings.pullBeforePush?"and pull ":""}only. It will still be called commit-and-sync.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`大多数情况下,您希望在提交后推送。关闭此选项会将提交并同步操作变为仅提交${r.settings.pullBeforePush?"和拉取":""}操作。它仍然会被称为提交并同步。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`On commit-and-sync, pull commits as well. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${r.settings.disablePush?"":"and push "}only.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`在提交并同步时,同时拉取提交。关闭此选项会将提交并同步操作变为仅提交${r.settings.disablePush?"":"和推送"}操作。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Most of the time you want to push after committing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit only. It will still be called commit-and-sync.")
regex.target: .setDesc("大多数情况下,您希望在提交后进行推送。关闭此选项会将提交和同步操作变为仅提交。它仍将被称为提交和同步。")

regex.source: .setDesc("On commit-and-sync, pull commits before pushing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit and push only.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在提交和同步时,在推送之前拉取提交。关闭此选项会将提交和同步操作变为仅提交和推送。")
.setDesc("启动 Obsidian 时自动拉取更新")

regex.source: .setDesc("Commit -> pull -> push (Only if pushing is enabled)")
regex.target: .setDesc("提交 -> 拉取 -> 推送(仅当启用推送时)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the author of the commit in the history view")
regex.target: .setDesc("在历史视图中显示提交的作者")

regex.source: super(`Modifying the index is not possible because you have unmerged files: ${e.toString}. Fix them up in the work tree, and then use 'git add/rm as appropriate to mark resolution and make a commit.`)
regex.target: super(`无法修改索引，因为您有未合并的文件: ${e.toString}。请在工作树中修复它们，然后使用 'git add/rm' 标记解决并提交.`)

regex.source: super(`An internal error caused this command to fail. Please file a bug report at https://github.com/isomorphic-git/isomorphic-git/issues with this error message: ${e}`)
regex.target: super(`内部错误导致此命令失败。请在 https://github.com/isomorphic-git/isomorphic-git/issues 提交错误报告，附上此错误信息: ${e}`)

regex.source: super(`The filepath "${e}" contains unsafe character sequences`)
regex.target: super(`文件路径 "${e}" 包含不安全的字符序列`)

regex.source: super(`Object ${e} ${i?`at ${i}`:""}was anticipated to be a ${r} but it is a ${n}.`)
regex.target: super(`对象 ${e} ${i?`位于 ${i}`:""} 预计是 ${r}，但它是 ${n}.`)

regex.source: super(`Expected a 40-char hex object id but saw "${e}".`)
regex.target: super(`预期是一个 40 字符的十六进制对象 ID，但看到的是 "${e}".`)

regex.source:
super(`Could not find a fetch refspec for remote "${e}". Make sure the config file has an entry like the following:
[remote "${e}"]
	fetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/origin/*
`)
regex.target:
super(`找不到远程 "${e}" 的 fetch refspec。请确保配置文件中有如下条目：
[remote "${e}"]
	fetch = +refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/origin/*
`)

regex.source: super(`Failed to create ${e} at ${n} because it already exists.${r?` (Hint: use 'force: true' parameter to overwrite existing ${e}.)`:""}`)
regex.target: super(`创建 ${e} 在 ${n} 时失败，因为它已存在。${r?`（提示: 使用 'force: true' 参数覆盖现有的 ${e}。）`:""}`)

regex.source: super(`Found multiple ${e} matching "${n}" (${r.join(", ")}). Use a longer abbreviation length to disambiguate them.`)
regex.target: super(`找到多个匹配 "${n}" 的 ${e} (${r.join(", ")})。请使用更长的缩写长度以消除歧义。`)

regex.source: super(`Your local changes to the following files would be overwritten by checkout: ${e.join(", ")}`)
regex.target: super(`以下文件的本地更改将在检出时被覆盖：${e.join(", ")}`)

regex.source: super(`Failed to checkout "${e}" because commit ${n} is not available locally. Do a git fetch to make the branch available locally.`)
regex.target: super(`无法检出 "${e}"，因为提交 ${n} 在本地不可用。请执行 git fetch 使该分支在本地可用.`)
super("从 git 服务器收到空响应.")

regex.source: super("A simple fast-forward merge was not possible.")
regex.target: super("无法进行简单的快进合并.")

regex.source: super(`One or more branches were not updated: ${e}`)
regex.target: super(`一个或多个分支未更新: ${e}`)

regex.source: super(`"${e}" would be an invalid git reference. (Hint: a valid alternative would be "${n}".)`)
regex.target: super(`"${e}" 将是一个无效的 Git 引用。 (提示: 一个有效的替代方案是 "${n}".)`)

regex.source: super("Merges with conflicts are not supported yet.")
regex.target: super("尚不支持带有冲突的合并.")

regex.source: super(`Automatic merge failed with one or more merge conflicts in the following files: ${e.toString()}. Fix conflicts then commit the result.`)
regex.target: super(`自动合并失败，以下文件存在一个或多个合并冲突: ${e.toString()}。解决冲突后提交结果。`)

regex.source: super(`No name was provided for ${e} in the argument or in the .git/config file.`)
regex.target: super(`在参数或 .git/config 文件中未提供 ${e} 的名称.`)

regex.source: super(`The function requires a "${e}" parameter but none was provided.`)
regex.target: super(`该函数需要一个 "${e}" 参数，但未提供.`)

regex.source: super('There are multiple errors that were thrown by the method. Please refer to the "errors" property to see more')
regex.target: super('该方法抛出了多个错误。请参阅 "errors" 属性查看更多')

regex.source: super(`Push rejected${n}. Use "force: true" to override.`)
regex.target: super(`推送被拒绝${n}。使用 "force: true" 覆盖.`)

regex.source: super(`Remote does not support the "${e}" so the "${n}" parameter cannot be used.`)
regex.target: super(`远程不支持 "${e}"，因此无法使用 "${n}" 参数.`)

regex.source: super(`Remote did not reply using the "smart" HTTP protocol. Expected "001e# service=git-upload-pack" but received: ${e}`)
regex.target: super(`远程未使用 "智能" HTTP 协议回复。预期收到 "001e# service=git-upload-pack"，但收到: ${e}`)

regex.source: super(`Git remote "${e}" uses an unrecognized transport protocol: "${n}"`)
regex.target: super(`Git 远程 "${e}" 使用了一个无法识别的传输协议: "${n}"`)

regex.source: super(`Could not merge index: Entry for '${e}' is not up to date. Either reset the index entry to HEAD, or stage your unstaged changes.`)
regex.target: super(`无法合并索引: '${e}' 的条目未更新。请重置索引条目为 HEAD，或暂存您的未暂存更改.`)

regex.source: super(`"${e}" does not point to any commit. You're maybe working on a repository with no commits yet. `)
regex.target: super(`"${e}" 没有指向任何提交。您可能正在一个尚未有提交的仓库中工作.`)

regex.source:
` Feature guide and quick examples
The commit hash, author name and authoring date can all be individually toggled.
Hide everything, to only show the age-colored sidebar.`
regex.target:
` 功能指南和快速示例
提交哈希、作者姓名和创作日期都可以单独切换。
隐藏所有内容,仅显示着色时间的侧边栏。`

regex.source:
` By default (deactivated), each line only shows the newest commit where it was changed.
With same commit, cut-copy-paste-ing of text is followed within the same commit and the original commit of authoring will be shown.
With all commits, cut-copy-paste-ing text inbetween multiple commits will be detected.
It uses git-blame and for matches (at least ${Sl} characters) within the same (or all) commit(s), the originating commit's information is shown.`
regex.target:
` 默认情况下(未激活),每行只显示最新的更改提交。
使用 同一提交,剪切、复制和粘贴文本会在同一提交内进行,显示原始提交的作者信息。
使用 所有提交,剪切、复制和粘贴文本将跨多个提交进行检测。
它使用 git-blame,并且对于在同一(或所有)提交中匹配的内容(至少 ${Sl} 个字符),显示来源提交的信息。`

regex.source: ` The time-zone in which the authoring date should be shown. Either your local time-zone (default), the author's time-zone during commit creation or UTC\xB100:00. `
regex.target: ` 显示创作日期的时区。 可以是您的本地时区(默认), 提交时作者的时区,或者 UTC\xB100:00. `

regex.source:
` Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same.
If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection. `
regex.target:
` 空格和换行符默认被解释为 文档的一部分并且在更改中被识别(因此不会被忽略)。 这使得当添加新行时,最后一行仍然显示为“已更改”, 即使之前的最后一行文本相同。
如果您不关心纯空白的更改 (例如列表嵌套/引用缩进的变化), 那么启用此功能将提供更有意义的更改检测。 `
'"FileSystem.exists()"函数中出现未经处理的错误'

regex.source: .setDesc('Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.')
